name: nexus-cpp
description: Nexus C/C++ (thin) — a stack extension for the `nexus` core pipeline. Ships the C/C++ adapter for the mine-verify-cover method: mull (the C++ Stryker-equivalent) driving GoogleTest/CTest inside a Docker toolchain (clang-15 + mull-15 + GoogleTest + libclang), the exit()-wrap neutralization, header-only template mutation, and the equivalent-mutant filter. Reuses nexus's agents, rules, commands, and security guard — install ALONGSIDE nexus, not instead of it.
